steps.title: Find the lowest weight
steps.content: The statement must be completed with the bear that has the smallest approximate weight in the table. The explanation compares each listed bear's weight to identify the minimum.

steps.title: Match weight to sex and age
steps.content: Choice A names a 13-year-old female at 375 pounds. Choice B names a 6-year-old female at 400 pounds. Choice C names a 10-year-old male at 800 pounds. The lowest listed value is 200 pounds for a 3-year-old male. The answer is D.
